nasb.text: He says to himself, “I will not be moved; Throughout all generations I will not be in adversity.”

esv.text: He says in his heart, “I shall not be moved; throughout all generations I shall not meet adversity.”

cnv.text: 他心裡說：“我必永不搖動， 我決不會遭遇災難。”

ccb.text: 他们自以为可以屹立不倒， 世世代代永不遭殃。

csbs.text: 他心里说：“我必不动摇， 世世代代不遭恶事。”
